skill.name: kubernetes-deployment
skill.description: Kubernetes deployment workflow for container orchestration, Helm charts, service mesh, and production-ready K8s configurations.
skill.summary: Kubernetes deployment workflow for container orchestration, Helm charts, service mesh, and productio...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation and workflow guide for Kubernetes deployment. Static analysis flagged backtick characters as 'shell execution' but these are markdown code formatting syntax, not actual shell commands. No security risks confirmed - the skill only provides workflow prompts and does not execute any commands.

content.user_title: Deploy to Kubernetes with Claude Code
content.value_statement: Streamline Kubernetes deployment workflows including containerization, Helm charts, service mesh configuration, and production-ready K8s patterns.
actual_capabilities: Generate Kubernetes manifests for Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps, and Secrets
Create and structure Helm charts with values.yaml
Configure service mesh with Istio or Linkerd
Set up Kubernetes security with RBAC and NetworkPolicies
Integrate observability with Prometheus and Grafana
limitations: Does not execute Kubernetes commands directly
Requires separate skills for actual cluster interaction
Does not provide cluster connectivity or credentials
Templates require adaptation to specific environments

use_cases.title: DevOps Engineer Automation
use_cases.description: Automate end-to-end deployment workflows for containerized applications to Kubernetes clusters

use_cases.title: Platform Team Templates
use_cases.description: Create reusable deployment templates and Helm charts for team-wide Kubernetes deployments
use_cases.target_user: Platform teams building internal deployment standards

use_cases.title: Developer Quick Start
use_cases.description: Get guided workflow for deploying applications to Kubernetes without deep K8s expertise

prompt_templates.title: Basic K8s Manifest Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @kubernetes-deployment to create Kubernetes manifests for my application. I need a Deployment, Service, and ConfigMap for a Python web API.

prompt_templates.title: Helm Chart Creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @kubernetes-deployment with @helm-chart-scaffolding to create a Helm chart for my microservice with environment-specific values.

prompt_templates.title: Service Mesh Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @kubernetes-deployment and @istio-traffic-management to configure Istio service mesh with mTLS and traffic splitting.

prompt_templates.title: GitOps Deployment
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @kubernetes-deployment and @gitops-workflow to set up a GitOps deployment pipeline with ArgoCD for my K8s cluster.

output_examples.input: Create Kubernetes deployment for a Node.js API
output_examples.output: Multi-phase workflow: Container preparation -> K8s Manifests -> Helm Chart -> Security -> Deployment with quality gates

output_examples.input: Set up monitoring for K8s cluster
output_examples.output: Prometheus configuration + Grafana dashboards + Alert rules + Distributed tracing setup

best_practices: Use environment-specific values.yaml files to separate dev/staging/production configurations
Implement proper RBAC policies following principle of least privilege
Enable monitoring and alerting before deploying to production
anti_patterns: Hardcoding secrets directly in Kubernetes manifests
Deploying without health checks and readiness probes configured
Skipping rollback strategy in deployment configuration

faq.question: Does this skill connect to my Kubernetes cluster?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides workflow guidance and prompts. It requires separate skills for actual kubectl commands.

faq.question: What skills should I combine with this?
faq.answer: Use with docker-expert, k8s-manifest-generator, helm-chart-scaffolding, and gitops-workflow for complete workflows.

faq.question: Can I use this without Kubernetes knowledge?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow guides you through each phase with clear prompts and best practices.

faq.question: Does it support Helm 3?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes Helm chart scaffolding for Helm 3.

faq.question: Which service mesh options are supported?
faq.answer: Istio, Linkerd, and generic service mesh patterns are supported in the workflow.

faq.question: How do I adapt templates for my environment?
faq.answer: Modify values.yaml files for your specific namespace, image tags, and resource limits.
